## Type of Change

Select the type(s) that apply:

- [ ] 🐛 **Bug fix** — non-breaking change that fixes an issue
- [ ] ✨ **New feature** — non-breaking change that adds functionality
- [ ] 💥 **Breaking change** — fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change
- [ ] 📝 **Documentation** — changes to docs, comments, or README
- [ ] ♻️ **Refactor** — code restructuring with no functional changes
- [ ] 🎨 **Style** — formatting, whitespace, or visual changes (no logic changes)
- [ ] ⚡ **Performance** — changes that improve performance
- [ ] 🔧 **Chore** — build process, CI/CD, tooling, or dependency updates

## Checklist

Please confirm the following before requesting a review:

- [ ] I have tested my changes locally in at least two browsers.
- [ ] My changes do not introduce any breaking changes.
- [ ] I have updated documentation where applicable.
- [ ] My code follows the project's code style guidelines.
- [ ] My commit messages follow the conventional commit format.
- [ ] I have checked for accessibility (keyboard navigation, screen reader support).
- [ ] I have tested on mobile or using responsive mode (if UI changes are involved).
